home.title: Find your lawyer
home.subtitle: Verified advocates and legal professionals online — choose the right one for you.

common.noSlots: No free slots in the next 14 days.
common.testPayNotice: Test mode — no real card required. Live payments arrive with the Epoint integration.

directory.title: Lawyers
directory.subtitle: Only verified and approved professionals are listed.
directory.empty: No lawyers match these filters. Simplify the search or reset the filters.

errors.OWN_SERVICE: You can't book your own service.

catalog.title: Document templates
catalog.subtitle: Answer the questions — the system prepares the legal document and delivers it as a PDF. Every document carries a unique verification code.

tplDetail.licenseNote: The generated document is licensed only for the matter described by your answers, is delivered as an edit-locked PDF, and carries a unique verification code.

wizard.license: I agree: the document is intended only for the matter described above; using it in other matters violates the license terms. The document does not replace legal advice.

errors.INVALID_FIELD: One answer is invalid — go back and check.
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many attempts — try again in a few minutes.
errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.
Something went wrong. Try again shortly.

verify.title: Document verification
verify.subtitle: Enter the code at the bottom of a Vakilim.az document — we'll confirm it was created on the platform.
verify.notFound: No document found for this code.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your phone number — we'll send a verification code by SMS.
login.sentTo: A verification code was sent to <phone></phone>.

errors.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.CODE_EXPIRED: The code expired. Request a new one.
errors.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many wrong attempts. Request a new code.
errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.

errors.INVALID_STATE: This booking's status changed. Refresh the page.
errors.TOO_LATE: The meeting already started — it can't be cancelled.
errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.

reschedule.title: Reschedule the meeting
reschedule.rule: You can move the time once, at least 24 hours before the meeting. Payment and chat history are preserved.

errors.SLOT_TAKEN: That slot was just taken — pick another.
errors.TOO_LATE: Less than 24h to the meeting — it can no longer be moved.
errors.LIMIT_REACHED: The time can only be changed once.
errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.
Something went wrong. Try again shortly.

apply.title: Join as a lawyer
apply.subtitle: Once your details are verified, your profile goes live on the platform.
apply.biosTitle: About you — in each selected language
apply.biosHelp: Write a short introduction for each language you claim (min 20 characters) — clients will see your profile in that language.
apply.docsNote: Used only for verification; never shown on your public profile.
apply.eYears: Enter years of experience (0 is fine).
apply.eBio: Write at least a 20-character introduction for each selected language ({l}).
apply.eAreas: Select at least one practice area.
apply.eAreasMax: You can select at most 5 areas.
apply.eIdDoc: Upload a scan of your ID.

errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FILE_TYPE: Only PDF, JPG, PNG and WEBP files are accepted.
errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.

dash.title: Lawyer panel
dash.pendingBody: Your documents are being checked. Once approved, your profile goes live.
dash.okBody: Your profile is live. You'll manage your meetings here.
dash.svcD: Set your meeting types and prices.
dash.availD: Set working hours — free slots are generated automatically.
dash.bookD: Approve requests and track upcoming meetings.
dash.revD: You can reply once to each client review.

svc.subtitle: Active services you set here appear on your public profile.
svc.ePrice: Enter the price in manats (at least 1).
svc.empty: You haven't added any services yet.

errors.INVALID_DURATION: Pick a duration for this meeting type.
errors.NOT_FOUND: Service not found. Refresh the page.
errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.

avail.subtitle: Set your weekly working hours — the system computes free slots automatically.
avail.preview: Preview — next 7 days (for a {d} min meeting)
avail.previewEmpty: Add a schedule — free slots will appear here.
avail.modeReq: Approval mode — I confirm every meeting myself
avail.modeInstant: Instant — free slots are confirmed automatically

errors.INVALID_BODY: Pick a valid interval (at least 15 minutes).
errors.OVERLAP: This interval overlaps an existing schedule.
errors.NOT_FOUND: Entry not found. Refresh the page.
errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.
